data.title: Data Encryption Standards
data.description: Adobe implements strong data encryption methodologies for data at rest and in transit.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Frequent security audits help identify vulnerabilities and areas for improvement.

data.title: User Authentication Protocols
data.description: Multi-factor authentication is enforced to prevent unauthorized access.

data.title: DDoS Mitigation Strategies
data.description: Adobe has implemented strategies to mitigate Distributed Denial of Service attacks.

data.title: Incident Response Plan
data.description: A structured incident response plan ensures quick resolution and minimal impact.
